note: These memes are created for fun. Jokes and actor attributions are fictionalized for meme context unless noted otherwise.

memes.joke: When your friend says he'll be ready in 5 minutes — 'Even Kattappa is still calculating the grand plan.'
Reincarnation level: You lost the remote and now you're searching like it's your past life mission.
When a tiny problem ruins your day — 'Don't underestimate the mosquito with a vengeance.'
When someone says 'I'll be there in 2 minutes' but you see them two hours later — 'Plot twist level: house entry scene.'
When breakup advice from your friend sounds harsher than the movie — 'Cut the recharge, not your feelings.'
When your boss asks who did the work — 'The intern's internship turned into a revolution.'
When you visit your ancestral village and start giving free Wi-Fi — 'Philanthropy level: neighborhood hero.'
When someone mistakes your kindness for weakness — 'Temper check: good deed meter overloaded.'
When you go undercover at a party and everyone recognizes you — 'The alias was on holiday.'
When the DJ plays your song and you suddenly become the main character — 'Instant dance battlefield unlocked.'
When the village gossip spreads faster than the internet — 'Bandwidth: local drama only.'
When you try to move on but your playlist keeps bringing you back — 'Repeat button is the real antagonist.'
